title: baeria tenerrima
intro: Baeria tenerrima, also known as the Desert Marigold or Baeria, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Baeria tenerrima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Baeria tenerrima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
